creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sean,

Please log in as a seanc@FreeBSD.org and leave comment here confirming the ownership of both accounts. See https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/article.html#bugzilla and https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/article.html#kerberos-ldap for details.
